overview.short: Kankrala (Marathi: कंक्राळा) is an ancient hill fort that occupies two hills in the Malegaon taluka of Nashik district.

topPlaces.name: Kashti, Nashik
topPlaces.description: Kashti is a panchayat village in the state of Maharashtra, India. Administratively, Kashti is under Malegaon Taluka of Nashik District in Maharashtra.

Kashti is a panchayat village in the state of Maharashtra, India. Administratively, Kashti is under Malegaon Taluka of Nashik District in Maharashtra.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kankrala?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kankrala is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

The nearest airport is Shirdi Airport (114 km) and the nearest railway station is Nashik Road (108 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kankrala?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kankrala at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kankrala?
faq.a: Stays in Kankrala start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kankrala?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kashti, Nashik, Kashti Malegaon.
